'''Rellnas Minor''' was the moon of [[Rellnas]]. While it had a variety of natural environments, the native [[Rellarin]] people were concentrated in coastal and island settlements in the frigid polar regions.<ref name="GG12" />

The Rellarins had a primitive, stone-age culture, and rarely left their homeworld. The only export of Rellnas Minor was the wisdom of the Rellarin tribal elders (called [[un'Yala]].) These sages were revered offworld, especially by the [[Swaze]] people of the [[Jidlor system/Legends|Jidlor system]], who sent their leaders to consult with the un'Yala every year.<ref name="GG12" />

By [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], an un'Yala named [[Moshene Tre]] had left Rellnas Minor to become a [[New Republic Observer]].<ref name="Specter" />
